nodes.name: 判断是否存在相同的记录
构建SQL判断SN是否存在，以及SN是否属于该工单

parameters.query: select r.retroid_id,j.joborder_number  from mes.mes.retroid r left join mes.mes.joborder j on r.joborder_id=j.joborder_id where r.retroid='{{ $json.req.retroid }}' and  r.status in('1','2')

nodes.name: 查询SN和SN对应的工单是否存在
查询配件SN和配件SN对应的工单是否存在
判断SN和工单号是否存在

nodes.name: 查询这个SN之前工序是否已经上传数据

parameters.query:
-- 查询满足条件的流程ID
SELECT 
    hpd.procedure_detail_id
FROM 
    mes.mes.history_procedure_detail hpd
WHERE 
    -- 使用EXISTS优化查询性能
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 
            1  -- 存在性检查无需返回实际字段
        FROM 
            mes.mes.history_procedure_list hpl
        JOIN 
            mes.mes.joborder j 
            ON hpl.procedure_list_id = j.procedure_list_id
        WHERE 
            j.joborder_number = '{{ $json.res.req.data.ticketNo }}' AND j.status=1  -- 工单号条件
            -- JSON包含检查（数值型示例）
            AND (hpl.procedure_detail_id::jsonb -> 'procedure_detail_id') @> 
                jsonb_build_array(hpd.procedure_detail_id)
    )
    -- 主查询的附加过滤条件
    AND hpd.procedure_dataupload = 2 order BY hpd.procedure_detail_id ASC

nodes.name: 获取该工单下的所有需要上传数据的工序

parameters.query: select r.procedure_id,hpd.history_procedure_id,hpd.procedure_name from mes.mes.resources as r join mes.mes.history_procedure_detail as hpd on r.procedure_id = hpd.procedure_detail_id where r.id='{{ $json.req.machine_id }}' order by hpd.history_procedure_id DESC LIMIT 1;

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: 设备未绑定工序，请重新绑定工序！

parameters.query:
SELECT md.* 
FROM mes.mes.machine_data AS md 
WHERE md.retroid_id = {{ $json.retroid_id }} 
  AND md.procedure_detail_id = {{ $json.procedure_id }}
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM mes.mes.machine_data AS md2 
    WHERE md2.procedure_detail_id = 91 
      AND md2.createtime > md.createtime
      AND md2.retroid_id = md.retroid_id
      AND md2.data->>'procedure_detail_id_old' ='{{ $json.procedure_id }}'
  )

nodes.name: 查询这个SN是否有上传的数据

parameters.query:
SELECT count(1) 
FROM mes.mes.machine_data m1
WHERE 
  m1.data->>'ticketNo' = '{{ $json.data.ticketNo }}' 
  AND m1.procedure_detail_id = {{ $json.procedure_detail_id }}
  and NOT (m1.data::jsonb) ? 'data_old'
  -- 修正：移除子查询中的 procedure_detail_id 限制，确保检测所有删除标记
  AND not  EXISTS (
       SELECT * 
    FROM mes.mes.machine_data m2 
    WHERE 
      m2.retroid_id=m1.retroid_id and
      m2.procedure_detail_id = 91
      and m2.data->>'procedure_detail_id_old' = '{{ $json.procedure_detail_id }}'
      and m2.createtime>m1.createtime
  )
select retroid_id from mes.retroid where retroid ='{{ $json.req.retroid }}' and  status in('1','2')
